name: Reverse-breadboard: 5 core subsystem wiring
description: docs/shaping.md traces actual wiring of Vault Mutation (two paths, ActionHistory dead code), Persistence (dual save, 3-failure lockout, silent errors), Image Serving (TILE_REQUEST severed, tiles disabled, OPFS 1s race), Undo/Redo (2 of 10+ paths record history), View Rendering (200ms debounce, 4/7 null guards, 16 prop drill, 10 overlapping effects). Affordance tables + Mermaid diagrams for each subsystem. 10 severed wires cataloged in cross-subsystem summary.

title: Requirements R0-R11 for system reconstruction
rationale: Reverse-breadboard of 5 subsystems (vault mutation, persistence, image serving, undo/redo, view rendering) revealed 10 severed wires and multiple stubs. Fit check against 8 current system parts shows: A6 Board (4 requirement failures) and A2 Persistence (3 failures, 0 passes) are highest-priority reconstruction targets. R5 (board persistence) and R8 (tab-close safety) have zero satisfaction anywhere. 4 requirements flagged as potentially solution-shaped (R0, R3, R6, R10). 12 unknowns identified with priority order: mutation safety (U1-U2) → undo viability (U3-U4) → tab-close strategy (U11) → board persistence (U9-U10) → tiles (U5-U6) → rendering (U7-U8) → types (U12).

title: Shape B: 7-part reconstruction with phased migration
rationale: Synthesized from 4 spikes. Bold on architecture (delete vault.update, HistoryStore, tile bridge, BoardVaultStore — ~1200 lines), conservative on migration (each part independently deployable). Key numbers: undo memory 42.8MB→596KB, undo CPU 3.6ms→0.05ms, all 7 views can read normalized state. Covers R0-R6,R8-R11 (10 of 12). R7 (ingest) intentionally deferred — not a data-loss risk. Build sequence: B1(vault)→B2(undo)→B7(boards) is critical path; B5(tiles) and B6(types) run in parallel.

title: Shape B adversarial evaluation: 6.5/10, 5 material gaps
rationale: Skeptical Auditor + Pragmatic Implementor stress-tested Shape B against live code. 5 gaps: (1) vault.load() is 3rd mutation path not addressed by B1, (2) jsonPatch.ts is shallow-only — 161B claim needs code fix, (3) B3 misses 4 root consumers (Sidebar, Export, Batch, QC), (4) B6 drops fixable/currentValue fields, (5) B7 underestimates type reconciliation 10-15h. Revised total: 73-89h (was 60h). Build sequence reordered: B5+B6 Day 1 quick wins, B4 independent of B3, B3 phased per-view.

title: MetadataView B3 resolved: all field types covered by existing vault actions
rationale: 15+ IIIF field types mapped to existing actions. 3 gaps (thumbnail, partOf, navPlace) handled by BATCH_UPDATE catch-all. No new action types needed. Minor: UPDATE_RIGHTS rejects empty string (callers must send undefined to clear). 7 mutation surfaces across 15 files cataloged.

title: Board type divergence resolved: 4-phase reconciliation, model types canonical
rationale: Full field-by-field divergence mapped: w/h vs width/height, resourceType vs type union, 6-value vs 4-value connection enums. 10 files blast radius. Phase 1: geometry rename (2-3h low). Phase 2: type discriminator (3-4h med). Phase 3: connection enum (3-5h high — UX change in edit dialog). Phase 4: BoardState merge (2-3h low). Total 10-15h. PresentationOverlay already has ResolvedItem workaround documenting the divergence.

title: Revised build sequence: B5+B6 Day 1, B4 independent, B3 per-view feature-flag
rationale: Original sequence had B4 after B3 and B5/B6 floating. Revised: Track 1 (quick wins) B5+B6 Day 1 zero risk. Track 2 (critical) B1→B2→B3 phased per-view (Archive first, has ViewBus). Track 3 (after B1) B4 parallel with B7. B4 persistence errors are independent of B3 view changes. Critical path: B1(4h)→B2(10h)→B3(30h). Total revised: 73-89h.

title: B6: discriminated union for ValidationIssue, not flat superset
rationale: ValidatorIssue (tree-level) and InspectorIssue (field-level) are fundamentally different granularities. Flat unification drops currentValue and conflates fixable/autoFixable. Discriminated union: TreeValidationIssue (kind:'tree') + FieldValidationIssue (kind:'field'). TypeScript exhaustive switch enforces narrowing. No fields dropped. Additive migration: add kind to both types, rename level→severity. ~40 lines, 3 files.

title: Connection enum: keep store's 4 types, model's 6 add zero IIIF value
rationale: connectionTypeToMotivation() collapses ALL 6 model connection types (associated, partOf, similarTo, references, requires, sequence) to 'linking' motivation on IIIF export. The model's vocabulary provides zero semantic benefit. Store's 4 types (sequence, reference, supplement, custom) are sufficient. Add 10-line mapping function at export boundary instead of 4-phase type reconciliation. Saves 3-5h. UI unchanged.

title: Gap spike revised total: 66-83h (down from 73-89h)
rationale: 5 gap fixes net -7h: B1 absorbs bypass deletion (+4h), B2 jsonPatch contained (-2h), B3 Phase 0 removes 2 easy consumers early (-2h), B6 discriminated union cleaner (-1h), B7 connection enum simplified (-4h). Key structural wins: single undo stack, entity-level patches, no fields dropped in ValidationIssue.

title: Shape B LOC impact: net -1460 lines, effort holds at 66-83h
rationale: Growth Architect (net -420) overstates additions with premature abstractions. Deletion Engineer (net -1644 corrected) overcounted 563 lines of live code as dead (commandHistory.svelte.ts, layerHistory.svelte.ts ARE imported). Verified dead code: 1670 lines (ActionDispatcher+deps 379, tile pipeline 715, BoardVaultStore 547, dead wires 29). B5+B7 deletion stars. B4 only net-positive part (+60, justified for persistence safety). Shape's 66-83h range realistic.

name: Verified dead code inventory: 1670 lines across B1/B2/B5/B7
description: ActionDispatcher class (247), activityStream.ts (65), getChangedIds (24), validateAction (28), executeAction alias (1), createActionHistory factory (3), deprecated undo/redo (11), lastActionType+ACTION_LABELS (28), statusBarIssues passthrough (1), tilePipeline.ts (543), tileWorker.ts (22), SW tile handlers (150), BoardVaultStore (547). commandHistory.svelte.ts and layerHistory.svelte.ts are LIVE — imported by CommandPalette and composer.ts respectively.

name: Phase 5 breadboard and slice
description: Forward-breadboard: 7 circuits (MC mutation, UR undo, PS persistence, VR views, IM images, VA validation, BD board), 55 affordances (43 code, 12 UI). Sliced into 3 tracks: T1 V5+V6 Day 1, T2 V1→V2→V3 critical path, T3 V4∥V7 after V1. Wire comparison: 14 preserved, 20 removed, 19 new, 10 severed→connected. Net -1475 LOC across 7 slices.

title: Reconstruction prompts updated through Phase 6
rationale: Phase 5 marked DONE, Phase 6 marked NEXT. All 7 slice prompts (V1-V7) have concrete affordance IDs (MC-*, UR-*, PS-*, VR-*, IM-*, VA-*, BD-*). Corrected vault.load() count to 7, mulch record count to 157.
